title: diasperus cyrtostylus
intro: Diasperus cyrtostylus, also known as the African boxwood or wild boxwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diasperus cyrtostylus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Diasperus cyrtostylus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
